---
title: "Lesson 1: A Confidence Interval for Proportions"
subtitle: "Statistical Estimation for Data Science and AI"
---

::: {.column-margin}
{{< video 01_a-confidence-interval-for-proportions.mp4 >}}

:::

## Slides

## Reflection
